title: Akamai Guardicore Network Flow Baseline Deviation Detection (`guardicore:network`)
spl:
index=microseg sourcetype="guardicore:network" earliest=-7d
| bin _time span=1h
| stats count by dst_port, _time
| eventstats median(count) as med by dst_port
| eval z=(count-med)/med
| where z>3
description: Sudden tenfold jumps on unusual ports may be C2 or ransomware staging.
value: Detects threats without static IOC lists.
implementation: Install the add-on, configure API polling intervals appropriate to API limits, and map assets to CMDB for enrichment lookups.

references.title: Splunkbase — Akamai Guardicore Add-on for Splunk

grandmaExplanation: We watch Guardicore data to spot unsafe inside-the-network traffic and policy gaps before attackers pivot far.
